identity.name: Nami Japanese Restaurant
identity.address: 55 Adelaide St E, Toronto, ON M5C 1K6
identity.location: 55 Adelaide St E, Toronto, ON M5C 1K6

narrative.summary:
𝗔𝗥𝗥𝗜𝗩𝗔𝗟

Adelaide & Church — The iconic illuminated wave facade designed by Raymond Moriyama (Ontario Science Centre, Toronto Reference Library) has beckoned diners since 1984.

blocks.title: Arrival
blocks.body:
𝗔𝗥𝗥𝗜𝗩𝗔𝗟

Adelaide & Church — The iconic illuminated wave facade designed by Raymond Moriyama (Ontario Science Centre, Toronto Reference Library) has beckoned diners since 1984.

blocks.title: Space
blocks.body:
𝗧𝗛𝗘 𝗦𝗣𝗔𝗖𝗘

Step through and you're transported — tatami rooms where you sit on the floor, kimono-wearing servers, one of the city's only robata bars where chefs grill over open flame in front of you. The sushi bar puts you eye-level with masters at work.

blocks.title: Food
blocks.body:
𝗧𝗛𝗘 𝗠𝗘𝗡𝗨

🍣 Sushi & Sashimi
• Omakase — market price ⭐
• Sushi Pizza — invented here in the 1980s ⭐
• Sashimi Deluxe — market fresh selection
• Chirashi — scattered sushi rice bowl

🔥 Robata (Grilled)
• Black Cod — flown in from Japan ⭐
• Wagyu Beef
• Yakitori selection
• Seafood robata platter

🍲 Specialties
• Sukiyaki — traditional hot pot
• Bento Box — complete meal
• Tempura selection

🥢 A La Carte
• Hand rolls
• Onigiri
• Various appetizers

Note: Much of the fish is flown in from Japan. Omakase recommended for the full experience.

blocks.title: Check
blocks.body:
𝗧𝗛𝗘 𝗖𝗛𝗘𝗖𝗞

💰 $$$

Dinner for 2: $120-180 (with drinks)
Omakase: $85-150pp

⚠️ FINAL DAY: MARCH 7, 2026

Reservations: Tock (exploretock.com/namijapaneserestaurant)
Walk-ins: Limited availability

📞 (416) 362-7373
🌐 namirestaurant.ca

𝗛𝗢𝗨𝗥𝗦
Tue–Fri: 11:30am–3pm, 5–10pm
Sat: 5–10pm
Sun–Mon: Closed

𝗕𝗘𝗦𝗧 𝗧𝗜𝗠𝗘𝗦
• Happy hour 5-7pm Wed — discounted drinks, quiet before dinner rush
• Lunch Tue-Fri for lighter crowds
• Book tatami room for special occasions (5+ people required)
• Final days will be packed — reserve NOW

𝗟𝗘𝗚𝗔𝗖𝗬
Hosted: Meryl Streep, U2, Rolling Stones, Meg Ryan, Russell Crowe, Carrie Fisher, Japanese Royal Family
Birthplace of sushi pizza (chef Kaoru Ohsada, 1980s)
40+ years defining Japanese dining in Toronto
